question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

answer: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.

assessment.note: She gave a clear self-assessment and named a specific thread — 'influence is uneven' — which suggests engaged reflection and should be drilled next.

new_queue.label: Uneven influence
new_queue.name: You said 'influence is uneven' — where has that shown up most clearly?

new_queue.label: Impact evidence
new_queue.name: What piece of work best shows the impact you think you had this quarter?

new_queue.label: Visibility signal
new_queue.name: What did you do this quarter to make your work visible to the right stakeholders?

new_queue.label: Friction point
new_queue.name: Where did cross-functional friction slow you down most this quarter?

new_queue.label: Escalation judgment
new_queue.name: What kind of call did you hold too long before escalating this quarter?

new_queue.label: Next-quarter focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to work on first over the next quarter?

history.answer_excerpt: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
